message:
feat(task-tracking): task 11 — implement task reminder formatters

Add task_reminders.go with three formatters:
- taskReminderFull: full task list for post-compaction injection
- taskReminderForInactivity: progress summary + next eligible tasks
- taskReminderNudge: one-time suggestion to use task_list

Add task_reminders_test.go with tests for all formatters (and
maybeInjectTaskReminder which is implemented in the next commit).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
